payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless steel side-by-side refrigerator approximately 1.5 m from camera; left door contains a recessed black water/ice dispenser with a damaged or missing inner panel, vertical dark handles on both doors, reflective finish showing smudges, horizontal streaks and slight denting, and the bottom/edges of the appliance are slightly cropped in the image.
